/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -pedantic -Wno-comment -O3 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -o /Users/ryosukemotobayashi/Inflatables/3rdparty/MeshFEM/python/_benchmark.cpython-310-darwin.so CMakeFiles/_benchmark.dir/benchmark.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ryosukemotobayashi/Inflatables/build-py310/3rdparty/MeshFEM/src/lib/MeshFEM -Wl,-rpath,/Users/ryosukemotobayashi/Inflatables/build-py310/3rdparty/MeshFEM/tbb ../lib/MeshFEM/libMeshFEM.dylib ../../triangle/libtriangle.a ../../libmeshfem_tinyexpr.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libumfpack.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcholmod.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcolamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libccolamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_filesystem.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_program_options.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib ../../tbb/libtbbmalloc.dylib ../../tbb/libtbb.dylib
